mapper.select: SELECT * FROM advertisements WHERE ad_id = #{adId} AND delete_yn = 'N'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO advertisements ( title, content, image_url, landing_url, start_datetime, end_datetime, advertiser_id, author_id, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{title}, #{content}, #{imageUrl}, #{landingUrl}, #{startDatetime}, #{endDatetime}, #{advertiserId}, #{authorId}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE advertisements SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, image_url = #{imageUrl}, landing_url = #{landingUrl}, start_datetime = #{startDatetime}, end_datetime = #{endDatetime}, status = #{status}, advertiser_id = #{advertiserId}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE ad_id = #{adId}
UPDATE advertisements SET delete_yn='Y', author_id = #{authorId}, updated_at = NOW() where ad_id= #{adId}
UPDATE advertisements SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE ad_id = #{adId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM advertisements WHERE delete_yn='N' AND status='OPEN' AND NOW() BETWEEN start_datetime AND end_datetime ORDER BY (clicks * 4) + (impressions * 1) + RAND() * 15 LIMIT 1;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM advertisements WHERE delete_yn='N'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM advertisements WHERE delete_yn='N' AND status='OPEN'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM advertisements WHERE delete_yn='N' AND status='PENDING'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM advertisements WHERE delete_yn='N' AND status='CLOSED'
